subcodes.first_line: These servants must, in these nights and days, render thanksgiving and praise unto the Lord of all beings, for through His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید این عباد در لیالی و ایام مالک انامرا شکر گوئیم و حمد کنیم چه که از عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
